idea-plugin.name: AI Unified Process Navigator
idea-plugin.description:
Navigate between @UseCase annotated test methods and their Markdown specs.
  • Gutter icon on @UseCase annotation jumps to the matching UC-XXX-*.md file
  • Gutter icon on **Use Case ID:** UC-XXX in Markdown jumps to all test methods with that ID
  • Gutter icon on ### BR-XXX business rule headers jumps to tests referencing that rule
Setup: the host project must define a Java annotation type called UseCase with attributes id, scenario, and businessRules. If the plugin sees Markdown specs in a project but no such annotation, it offers a one-time balloon with a "Create UseCase.java" action that scaffolds the file into a chosen source root. Works with the AI Unified Process (AIUP) methodology.

localInspection.displayName: Use Case ID has no matching spec
